theory.canonical_statement: ID5784 records Cosine Term Averages Zero Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation.
theory.technical_interpretation: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `00_Engine\Lemma-Maker\Prism\trawin_topology_unified_field_theory.tex` for registry alignment and later derivation.

latex_blocks: $\,s) the cosine term averages to zero, recovering Newton's static value \[ \langle G_{\text{eff}}\rangle_{\text{Planck}} = G_{0}. \] On intermediate timescales (seconds to years), modulations become observable as: \paragraph{Tidal Phenomena.} Lunar–terrestrial coupling reveals that $
canonical_equation.source_section_latex:
\[
$\,s) the cosine term averages to zero, recovering Newton's static value \[ \langle G_{\text{eff}}\rangle_{\text{Planck}} = G_{0}. \] On intermediate timescales (seconds to years), modulations become observable as: \paragraph{Tidal Phenomena.} Lunar–terrestrial coupling reveals that $
\]
